g.title: asset.copy:circ_lib->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (circ_lib) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: asset.copy:creator->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (creator) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: asset.copy:editor->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (editor) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: asset.copy:call_number->asset.call_number:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (call_number) REFERENCES asset.call_number(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: asset.copy:status->config.copy_status:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (status) REFERENCES config.copy_status(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: asset.copy:location->asset.copy_location:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (location) REFERENCES asset.copy_location(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: asset.copy:circ_modifier->config.circ_modifier:code
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (circ_modifier) REFERENCES config.circ_modifier(code) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: asset.copy:floating->config.floating_group:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (floating) REFERENCES config.floating_group(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
